economic_notes: Investments in Wahkohtowin Development LP (33.33%), Three Nations Drilling LP (33.33%), Mushkegowuk Regional Economic Development LP (16.67%), Northeast Superior First Nations Investment LP (33.33%), and 2680985 LP (33.33%), all accounted for under modified equity method. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 noted as potentially impacting future operations.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because financial information for certain First Nation business enterprises and joint ventures was not available, so investment values, net debt and accumulated surplus may be misstated. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Education expenses combined Employment and Training (55,516) and Education Fund (628,120) = 683,636. Per Capita Distribution of 576,779 appears to be a new one-time distribution in 2020 (nil in 2019). Write-down of 2558107 Ontario Inc investment of 184,500 noted in cash flow. COVID-19 pandemic impact disclosed. Total government transfers calculated as ISC (4,454,898) + CMHC (37,107) + Ministry of Health (162,535) = 4,654,540. OSR = 11,771,153 - 4,654,540 = 7,116,613.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
